name_en: đź’–Includes full original green box packagingđź’–Introduction: The 'March of Love' new fashion collection tells moving stories with color. Supreme is a representative fabric of the brand, inspired by 1930s vintage designs. The classic brown and ebony designs, reinterpreted with a fresh look, convey the brand's enduring design essence. This pattern also becomes a signature highlight on this Ophidia series mini shoulder bag. The material features boutique-quality PVC paired with high-density webbing, and high-end smooth vintage bronze hardware.
